steps.title: Match corresponding sides
steps.content: Since triangles QPR and STR are similar in that order, the matching vertices are Q with S, P with T, and R with R. Therefore, side $QP$ corresponds to side $ST$, and side $QR$ corresponds to side $SR$.

steps.title: Use the scale factor
steps.content: The scale factor from the larger triangle to the smaller triangle is $$\frac{ST}{QP}=\frac{6}{16}$$ Apply that factor to $QR=34$, because $QR$ corresponds to $SR$. $$SR=34\cdot \frac{6}{16}=\frac{204}{16}$$ The answer is A.
